summary: Telegram-callable Memory Doctor specialization path for diagnosing Spark memory delete integrity, topic traces, active profile facts, and dashboard memory shadow counts.
transfer_claim: Useful as a local diagnostic pattern for Spark memory systems; not a network-level repair doctrine.
evidence: Builder tests: tests/test_telegram_generic_memory.py -k memory_doctor or multiple_generic_deletions
Live local doctor run against Maya/Cem traces
privacy_boundary: local_only; reports may contain user memory traces and should not be published raw.
rollback: Disable Telegram natural-language Memory Doctor route and use CLI-only doctor.
